title: TIMELINE: Exhaustive Temporal Relation Annotation
description: Exhaustive temporal relation annotation between events in text. Annotators identify temporal expressions and events, then label all pairwise temporal relations (BEFORE, AFTER, INCLUDES, IS_INCLUDED, SIMULTANEOUS, VAGUE). Based on the TIMELINE corpus for comprehensive temporal reasoning.
citation:
